'''rokayaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:jejunojejunal|jejunojejunal]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-k-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jejunojejunal|jejunojejunal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| rokayaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:rokayithi|rokayithi]] || [[word:rokayiji|rokayiji]] || [[word:rokayishi|rokayishi]] || [[word:rokayiki|rokayiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:rokayuthuthu|rokayuthuthu]] || [[word:rokayujuju|rokayujuju]] || [[word:rokayushushu|rokayushushu]] || [[word:rokayukuku|rokayukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:rokayuthu|rokayuthu]] || [[word:rokayuju|rokayuju]] || [[word:rokayushu|rokayushu]] || [[word:rokayuku|rokayuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:rokayufthuf|rokayufthuf]] || [[word:rokayufjuf|rokayufjuf]] || [[word:rokayufshuf|rokayufshuf]] || [[word:rokayufkuf|rokayufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:rokayethe|rokayethe]] || [[word:rokayeje|rokayeje]] || [[word:rokayeshe|rokayeshe]] || [[word:rokayeke|rokayeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:rokayothotho|rokayothotho]] || [[word:rokayojojo|rokayojojo]] || [[word:rokayoshosho|rokayoshosho]] || [[word:rokayokoko|rokayokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:rokayotho|rokayotho]] || [[word:rokayojo|rokayojo]] || [[word:rokayosho|rokayosho]] || [[word:rokayoko|rokayoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:rokayofthof|rokayofthof]] || [[word:rokayofjof|rokayofjof]] || [[word:rokayofshof|rokayofshof]] || [[word:rokayofkof|rokayofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:rokay챦fth챦f|rokay챦fth챦f]] || [[word:rokay챦fj챦f|rokay챦fj챦f]] || [[word:rokay챦fsh챦f|rokay챦fsh챦f]] || [[word:rokay챦fk챦f|rokay챦fk챦f]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:rokay챦fth챦fth챦f|rokay챦fth챦fth챦f]] || [[word:rokay챦fj챦fj챦f|rokay챦fj챦fj챦f]] || [[word:rokay챦fsh챦fsh챦f|rokay챦fsh챦fsh챦f]] || [[word:rokay챦fk챦fk챦f|rokay챦fk챦fk챦f]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:rokay챦fth챦f|rokay챦fth챦f]] || [[word:rokay챦fj챦f|rokay챦fj챦f]] || [[word:rokay챦fsh챦f|rokay챦fsh챦f]] || [[word:rokay챦fk챦f|rokay챦fk챦f]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:rokay챦fth챦f|rokay챦fth챦f]] || [[word:rokay챦fj챦f|rokay챦fj챦f]] || [[word:rokay챦fsh챦f|rokay챦fsh챦f]] || [[word:rokay챦fk챦f|rokay챦fk챦f]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:rokay챈th챈|rokay챈th챈]] || [[word:rokay챈j챈|rokay챈j챈]] || [[word:rokay챈sh챈|rokay챈sh챈]] || [[word:rokay챈k챈|rokay챈k챈]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:rokayathatha|rokayathatha]] || [[word:rokayajaja|rokayajaja]] || [[word:rokayashasha|rokayashasha]] || [[word:rokayakaka|rokayakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:rokayatha|rokayatha]] || [[word:rokayaja|rokayaja]] || [[word:rokayasha|rokayasha]] || [[word:rokayaka|rokayaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:rokayafthaf|rokayafthaf]] || [[word:rokayafjaf|rokayafjaf]] || [[word:rokayafshaf|rokayafshaf]] || [[word:rokayafkaf|rokayafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:rokayasha|rokayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:rokaysh챘sha|rokaysh챘sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rokayrosha|rokayrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rokaymusha|rokaymusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:rokayasha|rokayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorokaynksh챘sha|gorokaynksh챘sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorokaynkrosha|gorokaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorokaynkmusha|gorokaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorokaynkyasha|gorokaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:rokakayasha|rokakayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:rokakaysh챘sha|rokakaysh챘sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rokakayrosha|rokakayrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rokakaymusha|rokakaymusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:rokakayasha|rokakayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorokakaynksh챘sha|gorokakaynksh챘sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorokakaynkrosha|gorokakaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorokakaynkmusha|gorokakaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorokakaynkyasha|gorokakaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:rek챈yasha|rek챈yasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:rek챈ysh챘sha|rek챈ysh챘sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rek챈yrosha|rek챈yrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rek챈ymusha|rek챈ymusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:rek챈yasha|rek챈yasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorek챈ynksh챘sha|gorek챈ynksh챘sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorek챈ynkrosha|gorek챈ynkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorek챈ynkmusha|gorek챈ynkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorek챈ynkyasha|gorek챈ynkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:rokfayasha|rokfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:rokfaysh챘sha|rokfaysh챘sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rokfayrosha|rokfayrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rokfaymusha|rokfaymusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:rokfayasha|rokfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorokfaynksh챘sha|gorokfaynksh챘sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorokfaynkrosha|gorokfaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorokfaynkmusha|gorokfaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorokfaynkyasha|gorokfaynkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
